hero.title: Concept Explainer
hero.description: Break difficult ideas into clear explanations, practical examples, and manageable steps.

differences.title: Understanding without unnecessary complexity
differences.description: Focus on the essential ideas first, then build understanding one step at a time.

items.title: Plain language
items.description: Translate complex terms into explanations that are easier to follow.

items.title: Logical steps
items.description: See how each part of a concept connects to the next.

items.title: Useful examples
items.description: Connect abstract ideas to practical situations.

feel.title: A patient guide for difficult topics
feel.description: The experience keeps attention on understanding rather than terminology.

items.title: Start with the core idea
items.description: Identify the main point before exploring details.

items.title: Build understanding
items.description: Follow a structured explanation at a manageable pace.

items.title: Check the concept
items.description: Use examples to confirm how the idea works.

audiences.title: Who uses Concept Explainer
audiences.description: Useful whenever a topic needs a clearer starting point.

items.title: Students
items.description: Clarify difficult subjects while studying or revising.

items.title: Self learners
items.description: Build confidence when exploring unfamiliar topics.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Understand new concepts needed for work and skill development.

resourceSection.title: Tools for clearer understanding
resourceSection.description: Use structured explanations and examples as reusable learning resources.

items.title: Core summaries
items.description: Keep the central idea easy to identify.

items.title: Step breakdowns
items.description: Review each part of a concept in sequence.

items.title: Applied examples
items.description: See how the concept behaves in practical contexts.

groupedSection.title: Ways to explore a concept
groupedSection.description: Move from a simple overview toward deeper understanding.

items.name: Definition
items.description: Begin with a concise explanation of the concept.

items.name: Key parts
items.description: Identify the important elements and relationships.

items.name: Examples
items.description: Connect the idea to familiar situations.

items.name: Use cases
items.description: Understand when and why the concept matters.

technicalSection.title: Built for reusable explanations
technicalSection.description: Concept Explainer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Ready to understand a difficult concept?
finalCta.description: Open Concept Explainer and start with the topic you want to clarify.
